pi_items.source: Task description: 'Create an ORDERED sequence named invoiceIdSeq starting at 1000 with increment 1' and 'The resulting InvoiceId values should be 1000, 1001, 1002, 1003, 1004 respectively'
Task description: 'Insert the following five invoices IN THIS ORDER' followed by exactly 5 records with distinct CustomerEmail values

Task description: 'Create a new vertex class Invoices (extending V) with these properties:' followed by explicit list of 7 properties: InvoiceId (INTEGER), CustomerEmail (STRING), Amount (DOUBLE), Currency (STRING), IssuedDate (DATE), Description (STRING), Status (STRING)

Task description: 'using sequence(invoiceIdSeq).next() for each InvoiceId' with starting value 1000 and increment 1 produces exactly these IDs. Task explicitly states: 'The resulting InvoiceId values should be 1000, 1001, 1002, 1003, 1004 respectively'

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task creates an ORDERED sequence named invoiceIdSeq starting at 1000 with increment 1. It inserts exactly 5 invoice records into the Invoices vertex class with IDs [1000, 1001, 1002, 1003, 1004]. The Invoices class contains 7 properties: InvoiceId, CustomerEmail, Amount, Currency, IssuedDate, Description, and Status. The invoice data is synthetic, defined directly in the task description, representing fictional hotel reservations.
